8: Claude CLI functions as a specialized coding assistant, with inherent tools for core
9: development tasks, including file ingestion, code structure analysis, and edit generation.
10: Its deep integration with Git facilitates direct branch and commit management. The
11: agent's extensibility is mediated by the Multi-tool Control Protocol (MCP), enabling
12: users to define and integrate custom tools. This allows for interactions with private APIs,
13: database queries, and execution of project-specific scripts. This architecture positions
14: the developer as the arbiter of the agent's functional scope, effectively characterizing
15: Claude as a reasoning engine augmented by user-defined tooling.
17: Google's Gemini CLI is a versatile, open-source AI agent designed for power and
18: accessibility. It stands out with the advanced Gemini 2.5 Pro model, a massive context
19: window, and multimodal capabilities (processing images and text). Its open-source
20: nature, generous free tier, and "Reason and Act" loop make it a transparent,
21: controllable, and excellent all-rounder for a broad audience, from hobbyists to enterprise
22: developers, especially those within the Google Cloud ecosystem.
